description: Deterministic, redacted 5EPlay protocol fixtures curated from provider captures whose raw files are intentionally not retained.

policy.scope: Provider JSON payloads and minimal transport metadata only.
excluded: DOM snapshots, screenshots, JavaScript bundles, and browser profiles
Realtime topic entropy and unrelated betting streams
policy.integrity: originalSha256 is the external source-capture attestation and can be checked when that capture is supplied; curatedSha256 hashes the exact self-contained fixture bytes.
policy.classification: kind=real means provider values are projections of an attested source capture. kind=synthetic means at least one envelope, partition, or state value was constructed and is described in derivation.

redactionNotes: Preserved independent overall, CT, and T player-stat planes, player comparisons, and MVP chart inputs from a normal three-map terminal response.
Retained only modeled public player-stat fields and normalized public asset URLs to deterministic fixtures.invalid placeholders.
Excluded odds and unrelated provider presentation fields.
Preserved the observed empty overall plane, non-empty CT and T planes, comparisons, and per-map player-stat planes from a technical terminal response.
Retained only modeled public player-stat fields and normalized public asset URLs to deterministic fixtures.invalid placeholders.
Excluded odds and unrelated provider presentation fields.
Preserved the complete provider response and all non-sensitive public data fields.
Removed credential-shaped keys if present and normalized public asset URLs to deterministic fixtures.invalid placeholders.
Capture time is the UTC conversion of the attested source-capture label timestamp because the response body has no embedded capture clock.
Preserved the complete provider response and all non-sensitive public data fields.
Removed credential-shaped keys if present and normalized public asset URLs to deterministic fixtures.invalid placeholders.
Capture time is the UTC conversion of the attested source-capture label timestamp because the response body has no embedded capture clock.
Event records are real MQTT observations; embedded public asset URLs were normalized.
Only the HTTP page envelope and six-item page partition are synthetic because non-empty paginated HTTP bodies were not retained.
entries.derivation: Six newest records from the first twelve retained real event observations, ordered newest-to-oldest.

redactionNotes: Event records are real MQTT observations; embedded public asset URLs were normalized.
Only the HTTP page envelope and six-item page partition are synthetic because non-empty paginated HTTP bodies were not retained.
entries.derivation: Next five older records from the same retained observations, ordered newest-to-oldest with no repeated cursor row; intentionally short to terminate pagination.

redactionNotes: Retained the MQTT transport envelope, version cursors, event identity, and match/player fields consumed by merge and decode logic.
Removed realtime topic entropy and normalized every retained public asset URL.
entries.derivation: Projection of JSONL row with sequence=30.

redactionNotes: Grouped three real MQTT observations to make the independent zero-version branch and subsequent ordinary-chain gap deterministic.
Projected player objects to domain-consumed fields and normalized every retained public asset URL.
entries.derivation: Projection of JSONL sequences 346, 376, and 377; no state or cursor value was synthesized.

redactionNotes: Retained the MQTT transport envelope, version cursors, event identity, and match/player fields consumed by merge and decode logic.
Removed realtime topic entropy and normalized every retained public asset URL.
entries.derivation: Projection of JSONL row with sequence=48.

redactionNotes: Retained the MQTT transport envelope, version cursors, event identity, and match/player fields consumed by merge and decode logic.
Removed realtime topic entropy and normalized every retained public asset URL.
entries.derivation: Projection of JSONL row with sequence=46.

redactionNotes: Retained the MQTT transport envelope, version cursors, event identity, and state/event payload needed by merge logic.
Excluded realtime topic entropy and high-volume per-player live arrays; normalized embedded public asset URLs.
entries.derivation: Projection of JSONL row with sequence=40.

Normalized every retained public asset URL to a deterministic fixtures.invalid placeholder.
